---
title: "Blog post title"
description: "One sentence summary for the blog index."
date: today
categories: [segregation, methods]
author: "Benjamin F. Jarvis"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

## Question

What substantive question does this blog post answer?

## Data and Measurement

Describe the data source, sample restrictions, scale, and key variables.

## Analysis

```{r}
# Replace with analysis code.
summary(cars)
```

## Interpretation

Translate the result into a substantive claim and state the uncertainty.

## Sensitivity

Describe the checks that would most change your confidence in the interpretation.
